options.name: -allow_paths
options.description: Allows paths between asynchronous clock groups to be traced in timing analysis

options.name: -asynchronous
options.description: Defines clock group with asynchronous clocks

options.name: -comment
options.description: Allows you to insert comments. The comments are read but are ignored with a one-time warning message.They are not used during timing analysis reporting nor are they written out during saving of constraints.

options.name: -group
options.description: Defines a set of clocks that are exclusive or asynchronous to the clocks defined in all other groups

options.name: -logically_exclusive
options.description: Defines clock group with clocks that do not have any functional paths between them, but coexist in the design at the same time

options.name: -name
options.description: Name of clock groups to be added

options.name: -physically_exclusive
options.description: Defines clock group with clocks that cannot exist in the design at the same time
